metadata.description: Shared Claude Code skills, commands, and plugins for Manfred

plugins.name: manfred-ui-design
plugins.description: Manfred-flavoured UI design: layout, colour, typography, responsive, dark mode, data viz, illustration, visual hierarchy. Hooks into shared/DESIGN.md tokens (no hex generation). Mobile first; flat first, depth is earned; Host Grotesk for UI; dark mode day-one.

plugins.name: manfred-interaction-design
plugins.description: Manfred-flavoured interaction design: animation, feedback, gestures, loading, micro-interactions, state machines, error-handling UX. Errors explain don't blame; motion respects prefers-reduced-motion; sustainability in the small. Defers copy to manfred-toolkit:ux-writing.

plugins.name: manfred-prototyping-testing
plugins.description: Manfred-flavoured prototyping + testing: prototype strategy, click tests, A/B tests, heuristic evaluation, accessibility test plans, test scenarios, user flows, wireframes. Implementation layer for manfred-discovery:assumption-test's cheapest-test menu — every skill maps fidelity / method to which Cagan risk it retires. Cheapest test wins; LEARN ≠ SHOW; A/B has hypotheses with MDE.

plugins.name: manfred-toolkit
plugins.description: Manfred-flavoured designer toolkit: UX writing (Manfred voice baked in), case studies, design rationale, design-system adoption + token audit, presentation decks, and the LinkedIn (Swedish) post trio. Voice rules from shared/manfred-brand.md enforced; errors explain don't blame; absorbs the linkedin trio from manfred-writing.

plugins.name: manfred-design-ops
plugins.description: Manfred-flavoured design ops: handoff specs (Linear-integrated, token-anchored), critiques, QA checklists, review process gates, sprints, team workflows, version control. Trio attendance; design system as source of truth; async-first.

plugins.name: manfred-ux-strategy
plugins.description: Manfred-flavoured UX strategy: design principles (rooted in shared/design-principles.md), north-star vision, competitive analysis, design briefs, experience maps, opportunity frameworks, stakeholder alignment, metrics. Customer-driven first; outcomes over outputs; warm + precise; critical & ethical.

plugins.name: manfred-design-systems
plugins.description: Manfred-flavoured design systems: tokens, components, theming, accessibility. Three-layer token architecture (primitives → semantic → shadcn contract), WCAG 2.2 AA baseline, composition over wrapping. Absorbs the a11y trio from manfred-a11y.

plugins.name: manfred-design-research
plugins.description: Manfred-flavoured user research: interviews, archetypes, journeys, empathy maps, usability tests, JTBD, card sorts, diary studies. Continuous discovery posture, Trio attendance, story-based interviewing.

plugins.name: manfred-discovery
plugins.description: Manfred-flavoured product discovery: Cagan's 4 risks, Torres's opportunity-solution trees and continuous discovery, Manfred's product brief

plugins.name: manfred-a11y
plugins.description: Accessibility design audits, dev-time checks, and pre-release QA gates. DEPRECATED — skills moved to manfred-design-systems in v0.15. Removed in v1.0.0.

plugins.name: manfred-writing
plugins.description: Meeting summaries (active). Linkedin trio + transcript anonymisation are DEPRECATED — moved to manfred-toolkit + manfred-design-research in v0.18. Plugin removed in v1.0.0 once meeting-summary finds its v1.0.0 home.

plugins.name: manfred-dev
plugins.description: Vite/React engineering workflow: pre-merge QA, deploy, production release

plugins.name: manfred-knowledge
plugins.description: Knowledge-management utilities: Obsidian vault linting, batch Markdown conversion
